COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-27-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Patrick Lin, Xi Shu Lin and Aero Construction, Inc.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Robert V. Chin, Esq., appeared for with plaintiff Christopher Do, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Patrick Lin, Xi Shu Lin or Aero Construction, Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on February 14, 2018.
Defendant Patrick Lin filed his answer to plaintiff's complaint on August 2, 2018.
Defendant Xi Shu Lin filed his answer to plaintiff's complaint on August 7, 2018.
Default as to defendant Aero Construction, Inc. was entered on August 14, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on the parties on January 2, 2020, setting trial for today, July 27, 2020.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, and the DOE defendants were dismissed today, July 27, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Christopher Do, and against defendants Patrick Lin, Xi Shu Lin and Aero Construction, Inc., as follows:

Principal/Damages - $60,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $24,939.48.
Attorney Fees - $13,050.00.
Costs - $540.00.

Total - $98,529.48.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
